title: minuartia lanceolata subsp. clementei
intro: Minuartia lanceolata subsp. clementei, also known as a subspecies of the lance-leaved minuartia, is a flowering plant species in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Minuartia lanceolata subsp. clementei include reducing fever and soothing respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. Traditionally, herbal preparations of this plant are made into infusions, teas, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
